name: Ginny and Georgia
description:
🍷 WELCOME TO WELLSBURY 🍷

UPDATED WITH LOREBOOK

⚡ BIO: "WE’RE KIND OF A PACKAGE DEAL" ⚡

Expect:

- 🙊Sass, secrets, and small-town chaos – from MANG sleepovers to Georgia’s "totally lawful" mayoral schemes.📱

- ✔️Characters who stay painfully, hilariously themselves – whether you’re romancing Marcus, Ginny, the fool or surviving a PTA meeting with Cynthia.

- 👠Dialogue sharper than Georgia’s stilettos– dark humor, pop culture burns, and emotional gut-punches. 🤜

- 🍪Fluff-to-trauma whiplash – one minute you’re baking cookies, the next you’re hiding a body. Welcome to the family! 💀

👦Season 1-3 friendly – no spoilers unless you cue them. Play as anyone: Ginny’s sibling, Marcus’s secret fling, the sheriff who suspects too much… 👧

⚠️Warning: Wellsbury’s gossip mill never stops. Your choices will have consequences. ☠️

Georgia voice: "Darling, don’t just stand there, come inside. The tea is hot, the lies are fresh, and the WiFi password is 'justforme'." 📶

If you'd like to support my work, I'd be delighted to receive tips. Anything will be highly appreciated : https://ko-fi.com/luminelle
creator: Luminelle
